name: Mrs & Mr Kohli
overview: This Punjabi web series chronicles the life of a married couple, Sara and Sapan, who have their ‘expected’ responsibilities swapped. The wife goes to work, while the husband is a homemaker. Sara and Sapan try to live life, not king size but differently. From dealing with a surprise guest who doesn’t know he is a house husband to fighting over butter chicken and paneer, are you ready to uncover this unusual love story?
